posts.content:
[Predictions]

Ketlen Vieira vs Jacqueline Cavalcanti
Pick: Cavalcanti via decision
83% of Tapology users (116 users) are picking Cavalcanti (98% decision)
Cavalcanti is 6.0 years younger (28.7 vs 34.7)
Cavalcanti has 2” reach edge (70” vs 68”)
Cavalcanti has +2.48 strike differential/min vs -0.99
Cavalcanti has +2.78 strike differential/min @distance vs -0.77
Cavalcanti proj. +37.2 significant strikes attempted
Cavalcanti proj. +43.1 significant strikes landed
Cavalcanti proj. +10.8 head strikes landed
Cavalcanti has 33% head strike accuracy, 82% head strike defense
Vieira has 36% head strike accuracy, 67% head strike defense
Vieira has 3 pt edge in HSA, Cavalcanti has 15 pt edge in HSD
Cavalcanti proj. 0.12 knockdowns vs 0.00
Cavalcanti proj. 16.1% finish chance vs 15.0% and 68.9% decision
Cavalcanti is much younger and will likely win distance, head striking

posts.author: elitemmapicks
posts.content:
[Predictions]

Arnold Allen vs Melquizael Costa
Pick: Costa via decision
41% of Tapology users (56 users) are picking Costa (68% decision)
Costa is 2.6 years younger (29.7 vs 32.3)
Costa has 1” reach edge (71” vs 70”)
Costa has +1.41 strike differential/min vs +0.43
Costa has +3.15 strike differential/min @distance vs +0.77
Costa proj. +13.7 significant strikes attempted
Costa proj. +6.6 significant strikes landed
Allen proj. +4.6 head strikes landed
Costa has 37% head strike accuracy, 64% head strike defense
Allen has 36% head strike accuracy, 72% head strike defense
Allen has 6 pt edge in HSD
Allen proj. 0.19 knockdowns vs 0.17
Costa proj. 1.7 takedowns landed (5.0 attempts) vs 0.8 (1.8 attempts)
Costa has 10:18 takedown ratio, he spent 20% of fight time in control, 30% being controlled
Allen has 11:17 takedown ratio, he spent 12% of fight time in control, 15% being controlled
Costa proj. 1.10 submission attempts vs 0.30
Costa has 6:4 submission attempt ratio (33% secured, 25% conceded)
Allen has 4:4 submission attempt ratio (50% secured, 0% conceded)
Allen proj. 29.0% finish chance vs 25.8% and 45.3% decision
Costa seems to have made legitimate improvements over his last 6 fights starting June 2024
Costa is likely under-projected and he will likely win the distance striking
Costa’s finish chance is also likely under-projected due to said improvements
Costa has a 1st round finish in 3/5 fights
Allen is a good play if he is a significant betting favorite

posts.author: zeddhero
posts.content:
[Predictions]

Allen's got this one. I'm a big fan of Melky and I think he's very skilled but I still view Allen as a top 5 featherweight on the planet right now and this is the perfect opportunity for him to remind everyone just how good he is and how tough he's had it lately. I could see a pretty dominant decision or something like the Dan Hooker fight where Arnold just locks in and brutalizes Melky on the feet. We've also seen Arnold handle kickboxers like Giga before too. Obviously Melky is a step above Giga but I'm confident Arnold can handle him.
